title: Fresenius Dialysis & High-Volume HDF — Interactive Training Flipbook
subtitle: Clinical evidence, device technology, and bedside implementation for healthcare professionals
style_notes: Raouf Academy medical education illustration. Elegant teal-and-gold academy branding badge bottom-left on every page reading 'Raouf Academy'. Fresenius clinical textbook diagram style. Label all components as readable text within the image. Educational, not graphic. Ground in FME HVHDF handbook and 5008 IFU.

brand.name: Raouf Academy
brand.badge_style: white pill with Raouf company logo and Academy text
brand.prompt_suffix: Include Raouf Academy branding with corporate blue #1d3a88 color scheme and small Raouf logo badge.

modules.title: HDF Clinical Foundation
modules.description: Why hemodiafiltration surpasses conventional HD — mechanisms and evidence

pages.title: HDF vs HD — The Clearance Revolution
pages.objective: Compare diffusive HD with convective-diffusive HDF at a glance
pages.seed_query: Raouf Academy medical education — side-by-side comparison diagram of hemodialysis vs hemodiafiltration: left panel shows diffusive clearance across dialyzer membrane, right panel shows diffusion plus convection arrows with substitution fluid, labeled components, clinical textbook style 16:9, elegant Raouf Academy badge bottom-left teal and gold

pages.title: Middle Molecules & Uremic Toxins
pages.objective: Explain why β2-microglobulin and middle molecules drive HDF benefit
pages.seed_query: Raouf Academy — illustrated molecular weight spectrum of uremic toxins: small molecules (urea), middle molecules (beta-2 microglobulin, myoglobin), protein-bound solutes, with clearance bars comparing HD vs HDF, clinical infographic 16:9, Raouf Academy badge bottom-left

pages.title: CONVINCE Trial — Evidence at Scale
pages.objective: Summarize CONVINCE RCT mortality findings and dose achieved
pages.seed_query: Raouf Academy — clean medical infographic of CONVINCE trial results: 1360 patients, HDF vs high-flux HD, all-cause mortality 17.3% vs 21.9%, HR 0.77, mean convection 25.3 L per session, European map icons, textbook style 16:9, Raouf Academy badge bottom-left

modules.title: Post-Dilution HVHDF Technology
modules.description: Blood circuit, fluid paths, and membrane science on Fresenius systems

pages.title: 5008 Blood Circuit — HVHDF Overview
pages.objective: Orient learner to full extracorporeal circuit in post-dilution mode
pages.seed_query: Raouf Academy — post-dilution high-volume hemodiafiltration on Fresenius 5008: illustrated blood circuit diagram showing arterial line, blood pump, dialyzer, post-dilution substitution fluid port, venous drip chamber, operator touchscreen, all labeled, clinical textbook 16:9, Raouf Academy badge bottom-left teal gold

pages.title: Dialyzer Membrane Cross-Section
pages.objective: Show diffusive and convective transport at fiber level
pages.seed_query: Raouf Academy — cross-section illustration of hemodiafiltration dialyzer membrane: hollow fibers, blood compartment, dialysate compartment, ultrafiltration arrows, pore sizes for middle molecule passage, labeled educational diagram 16:9, Raouf Academy badge bottom-left

pages.title: Post-Dilution Substitution Fluid Path
pages.objective: Trace replacement fluid from ONLINE system to venous return
pages.seed_query: Raouf Academy — post-dilution substitution fluid path diagram: ultrapure dialysate through ONLINE pump to substitution port after dialyzer in venous blood line, arrows showing fluid direction, Fresenius 5008 context, labeled clinical illustration 16:9, Raouf Academy badge bottom-left

pages.title: DIASAFE®plus — Ultrapure Fluid Generation
pages.objective: Explain dual-filter endotoxin retention for online HDF
pages.seed_query: Raouf Academy — DIASAFE plus dual filter diagram for online HDF: dialysate inlet, two polysulfone filters in series, sterile substitution fluid outlet, endotoxin retention callout, Fresenius clinical style 16:9, Raouf Academy badge bottom-left

modules.title: Fresenius 5008 Device Mastery
modules.description: Hardware, monitor UI, and intelligent safety features

pages.title: Operator Monitor — HDF Prescription

pages.title: AutoSub plus & Venous Access Monitor
